primary.$description: Background to hero sections, often the main text colour, footer background

surface.$description: For cards or sub-elements of components or sections requiring light branding. Offers more contrast over white. eg some cards

interactive-default.$description: CTA buttons and links in their default state

interactive-hover.$description: CTA buttons and links in their hover state
